title: Shuchi Chawla
body: Shuchi Chawla is an Indian computer scientist who works in the design and analysis of algorithms, and is known for her research on correlation clustering,[CC] information privacy,[PD] mechanism design,[MD] approximation algorithms,[AO] hardness of approximation,[HA] and algorithmic bias. She works as a professor of computer science at the University of Texas at Austin.
categories: Indian expatriate academics in the United States
University of Texas at Austin faculty
